name: Ram Kumar
title: Senior Frontend Engineer
tagline: Senior frontend engineer building booking systems, dashboards, and animated product UIs in React and Next.js.
summary: Senior frontend engineer with extensive experience designing and scaling modern web applications in healthcare, fitness, and education. I led a frontend team delivering a calendar-based booking system, EMR, and CRM for the SendScript healthcare platform, and built an interactive 3D-animated onboarding UI for the Culnity fitness platform. I'm looking to apply deep React/Next.js expertise and leadership skills to drive high-impact frontend solutions and accelerate product growth.

highlights: Lead a frontend team, coordinating sprint planning and delivery with Agile ceremonies and Git — 95% on-time sprint completion rate
Established code-quality standards and PR workflows with Prettier and ESLint; designed a scalable React architecture using code splitting, cutting bundle size 20%
Mentored developers on performance optimization with React Query caching and animation best practices, reducing page-render time 30%
Drove architectural decisions for modular, high-performance frontend systems with code splitting and lazy loading, raising the Lighthouse score from 78 to 92
Collaborated with product, backend, and design teams to ship modular platforms in React.js and Next.js on a two-week release cadence
Migrated Angular 12 applications to Angular 13, refactoring with TypeScript to reduce technical debt
Built dynamic, schema-validated forms with Angular Forms, including complex conditional logic
Built responsive UI components with Tailwind CSS integrated into a PrimeNg-based design system
Reduced API response time from 20s to 3s — an 85% improvement
Shipped features on the Neo Exam and Neo Hire platforms using Node.js, Express, and Angular
Built 20+ web applications with ASP.NET C# and jQuery using component architecture and modern CSS
Managed SQL Server databases, writing optimized queries and indexing strategies that cut query response time

projects.name: SendScript
projects.description: A calendar-based booking system with a Google Calendar-like UI, built with React.js, code splitting, and animation. I added real-time consultation scheduling with React Query so clinicians see live availability, and integrated OnlyOffice for document automation — cutting contract-generation and processing time. Reusable components and a React Context-based state architecture kept the codebase easy to extend as we added features.

projects.name: Culnity
projects.description: An interactive, 3D-animated onboarding experience built with Theatre.js that made first-time use more engaging and increased time-on-page. I also built the gym discovery and booking flow with React Query and modular components, so users can filter gyms and complete a booking in a few clicks.

aiAndLearning: Implementing generative AI in frontend applications
Exploring AI-powered UI and workflow automation
Hands-on with Claude, Ollama, Hugging Face, OpenClaw
achievements: Rookie Neo Award for UI excellence
Delivered features with zero deadline slippage
vision: Growing as a frontend architect / engineering leader
Mentoring developers and improving team productivity
Focused on scalable systems and clean architecture
Goal: build AI-powered products and contribute to open source
